judge_thought:
Explanation:
The players listed with last names starting with “F” are: Jim Farmer (1988–89), Derrick Favors (2011–present), Kyrylo Fesenko (2007–11), Derek Fisher (2006–2007), Greg Foster (1995–99), Bernie Fryer (1975–76), Todd Fuller (1998–99), and Terry Furlow (1979–80). The earliest by years for the Jazz is Bernie Fryer (1975–76). Therefore, the Prediction Answer “bernie fryer” correctly identifies the first such player.
